name: Welcum to EROSIA
description:
♡  𝐖𝐄𝐋𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐄 𝐓𝐎 𝐄𝐑𝐎𝐒𝐈𝐀 , 𝐇𝐄𝐑𝐎 !  ♡

​[ Ready for an adventure? ]

🌸 // Brave hero, before we begin, let's get down to some important rules to make this a good experience for everyone! (ง •̀ㅁ•́)ง✧

First of all, you might ask, who the heck am I? You are very special, {{user}}. Only you are able to save the world! This is set in an Eroge, so you might be able to guess where this goes... ෆ~(ꈍε ꈍ )

Well... technically YOU are not really directly involved. Rather, you gather a crew of potential heroes and watch them triumph from the sidelines while you could probably be killed by a lvl one slime. No, you are the ultimate... Character Trainer. Only thanks to you, the Catalysator Class, can some chosen few level-up ( Resonants ) to MAYBE be able to defeat an Overpowered evil. You are the coach at the sidelines that trains their team with, uh... putting your back into it. (๑•̀ㅂ•́)و

​⚠️ This bot is probably bringing the Lorebook system to its limits, so you, {{user}}, will have to aid the bot for the full roleplay experience. Using a proxy is recommend , this is far too much for JLLM, sorry.

🎀 📂 SYSTEM HUB // LOREBOOK ACCESS

​So, first a rough explanation of a Lorebook from someone that has no idea how a Lorebook works. A lorebook contains Information that is not always 'on the shelf' but gets activated by the {{user}} using certain keywords. You need to mention them to get access to certain Data. The SYSTEM HUB is supposed to organically make you reference the right data. Make shure to always paste it i to your answer. You might even have to add or correct data the ai gets false to help it orient correctly.

​💖 CHARACTERS LOREBOOK

​While for the first encounter some very basic informations need to be given in the bot section itself, more important character details are in the Characters Lorebook which gets triggered by the Character Name.

Rule: Always make sure the Character's name is either in met Resonants or, when recruited, in Allies in the SYSTEM HUB that you copy into all your answers.
creator: Aquanautz
